events.name: Porsche Run 5K
events.description: A premium community 5K through the Santa Barbara countryside. Optional pre-race vintage Porsche drive and post-race wine tasting at Ridgeline Winery. Built for first-timers and lifers alike.

events.name: Big Sur Coastal Half Marathon
events.tagline: Cliffs, switchbacks, ocean to your right.
events.description: 13.1 miles along Highway 1, with rolling climbs and constant Pacific views. Point-to-point with finish at Bixby Bridge.

events.name: Brooklyn 10K
events.tagline: Five neighborhoods. Six clicks. One borough.
events.description: An urban 10K starting in DUMBO, weaving through Williamsburg and Bed-Stuy, finishing back at the Manhattan Bridge. Live DJ corrals every kilometer.

events.name: Skyline 50K Ultra
events.tagline: Above the clouds. Above the noise.
events.description: A high-altitude 50K traversing the Boulder ridgeline. 7,200 ft of vertical gain, sustained sections above 9,000 ft. Mandatory gear check at start. Boston-qualifier eligible at sub-5:00.

events.name: Lakeshore Marathon
events.tagline: Twenty-six point two on the water.
events.description: A flat, fast Chicago marathon along Lake Michigan. Boston qualifier. Closed roads, 11 aid stations, finish at Grant Park.

events.name: Glow Run 5K
events.description: An evening 5K through downtown Austin. Every runner gets a glow kit at packet pickup. Music stages every kilometer, finish line dance party.

events.name: Hayward Mile Showcase
events.description: An invitational mile at the cathedral of American track. Pro and elite athletes only. Spectator tickets available; runner registration is application-based.

events.name: Hope 10K Charity Run
events.description: A 10K through the Boston Common with 100% of proceeds going to childhood cancer research. Family-friendly, stroller-accessible, no qualifying time required.

events.name: Sedona Sunrise Trail Half
events.tagline: Red rocks. Cold air. First light.
events.description: A 13.1-mile trail half through Sedona's red rock canyons, starting before sunrise. Technical sections, 2,100 ft of climbing. Hydration vest required.

events.name: Color Splash 5K
events.description: A casual 5K where you'll get hit with color powder at every kilometer. Walk or run, no clock. Best in white. Family-friendly.

events.name: Pacific Beach Marathon
events.description: A flat, scenic marathon along the San Diego coast from La Jolla to Coronado. Sunrise start, oceanfront finish. Boston qualifier on a fast course.

events.name: Junior Mile Series #3
events.description: Round three of the regional junior mile series. Three age brackets: U12, U14, U16. Open to all club-affiliated junior runners.

events.name: Napa Vineyard 10K
events.description: A 10K through the heart of Napa Valley, weaving between cabernet vines. Includes a tasting flight at the finish line. Must be 21+.

events.name: Pacific Coast 100
events.description: A 100-mile point-to-point ultra from Marin to Big Sur. 30-hour cutoff. Mandatory crew, drop bags at 10 stations, hydration vest required. Western States qualifier.

events.name: Virtual Global 5K
events.tagline: Your route. Your time. One weekend.
events.description: Run 5K anywhere in the world during a 7-day window. Submit your time via the RunClub app. Finisher medal mailed to all completers. Open globally.

events.name: Masters Mile Throwdown
events.description: A masters-only mile (age 40+) on a fast indoor track. Heats by age and seed time. Bring your old PR. Take a new one home.

events.name: City Lights Half Marathon
events.description: A nighttime half marathon through downtown Nashville. Live music at every mile marker. Finish line is at the riverfront with full afterparty.

events.name: Forest Park Trail 25K
events.description: A 25K trail run through Forest Park's old-growth singletrack. Pacific Northwest at its wettest and prettiest. Trail shoes required. No course cutoff.

events.name: Sunset Beach 5K
events.tagline: Sand, salt, and a soft course.
events.description: A 5K barefoot beach run at sunset along South Beach. Sand course is non-certified — leave the watch at home. Music, beer at the finish.

events.name: Capital Marathon
events.description: 26.2 miles through Washington DC, passing the Lincoln Memorial, Capitol, and Tidal Basin. Boston-qualifier course, certified, with strict 6-hour cutoff.
